info.title: Client API
info.description:
In swagger ui Authorization header is already defined.

In other cases, get a token first using POST /client-api/login and add it into Authorization header.

When implementing a client application, the API client in the application should handle Cookies (withCredentials: true).

Set the Referer header to control the host used for generated links in the response. If not provided, a default host will be used.

Locale could be change by using the _locale query param.

Body parameter filters in tableConfig for date columns supports range, for example 

    {
       "tableConfig": {
          "filters": [
            {
              "field": "col_columndefinitions_processedat_52e10f5d00f98aa49ebb90320c012a59",
              "value": "2022-12-01,2023-01-01"
            }
        ...

202.description: Request accepted and will be processed in background

For details, see the wiki article https://support.fxbackoffice.com/support/wiki/client/2094

customFields.description: list of account custom field codes

DebugCustomErrorResponseModel.description: Custom error. Will return one of the following fields

customFields.description: list of user custom field codes

ErrorResponseModel.description: Response format according to the API Problem spec (RFC 7807).

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

GetLoginChallengesRequest.description:
A request for the "challenges" that the user needs to complete before authorization.
The first request should include all fields (set to true). If, during the authorization process, only a specific challenge needs to be updated, for example, the captcha, the request should be sent with only the field `captcha=true`.

email.description: Optional. The email of the user who is about to log in.

GetLoginChallengesResponse.description: This response will return only the “challenges” that are currently active and required for authorization.

securities.description: Securities data as a map where keys are strings and values are arrays of strings.

valuesGroups.description: Groups of values as a map where keys and values are strings.

values.description: Values data as a map where keys are strings and values are arrays of strings.

isSubIbPercent.description: Indicates whether the rule applies to sub-IB percentages.

lotsDays.description: Number of days for lots calculation.

rememberMe.description: If true token's time to live 30 days else 1 hour.

host.description:
Optional parameter "host" which allows to change the host for links in email messages. 
CRM has configuration Allowed Hostnames, where you can set domains, allowed to use in Client API.

allOf.description: Always returns 200 OK status code. Even if email is not found.

rememberMe.description: When set, token's time to live is 30 days, else 1 hour

propertyPath.description: The property path of the violation.

leverages.title: NULL when platform does not support leverages.

ibId.description: for Demo type the field does not need to be passed

pspRule.title: Could be found as PSPRule property in step2AdditionalData.

useRefererHost.title: The url will have referrer as host.
